sentences.target: Sie hält heute eine kurze Rede.

translations.de: Sie hält heute eine kurze Rede.
translations.en: She is giving a short speech today.
translations.fr: Elle fait un court discours aujourd’hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 她今天要发表一个简短的演讲。
translations.yue: 佢今日會發表一場短嘅演講。
translations.ru: Сегодня она выступит с короткой речью.
translations.pt: Hoje ela vai fazer um discurso curto.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô ấy sẽ đọc một bài phát biểu ngắn.
translations.nl: Ze geeft vandaag een korte toespraak.
translations.hi: वह आज एक छोटा भाषण दे रही है।
translations.nb: Hun holder en kort tale i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini dia menyampaikan pidato singkat.
translations.sv: Hon håller ett kort tal idag.
translations.da: Hun holder en kort tale i dag.
translations.ja: 彼女は今日、短いスピーチをします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present, 3rd person singular; in the collocation 'eine Rede halten' meaning 'to give a speech'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Rede' (direct object).
Attributive adjective modifying 'Rede'; agrees in case (accusative), number (singular), gender (feminine).
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'hält'.

sentences.target: Nach der Rede klatschten alle laut.

translations.de: Nach der Rede klatschten alle laut.
translations.en: After the speech, everyone clapped loudly.
translations.es: Después del discurso, todos aplaudieron con fuerza.
translations.fr: Après le discours, tout le monde a applaudi très fort.
translations.it: Dopo il discorso, tutti hanno applaudito forte.
translations.ko: 연설이 끝난 후에 모두 크게 박수쳤어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 演讲结束后，大家都热烈鼓掌了。
translations.yue: 演講之後，大家都大聲拍手。
translations.pt: Depois do discurso, todos aplaudiram com força.
translations.he: אחרי הנאום כולם מחאו כפיים בקול רם.
translations.tr: Konuşmadan sonra herkes yüksek sesle alkışladı.
translations.vi: Sau bài phát biểu, mọi người vỗ tay rầm rộ.
translations.ar: بعد الخطاب، صفق الجميع بصوت مرتفع.
translations.nl: Na de toespraak klapte iedereen hard.
translations.hu: A beszéd után mindenki hangosan tapsolt.
translations.hi: भाषण के बाद सबने ज़ोर से तालियाँ बजाईं।
translations.el: Μετά την ομιλία όλοι χειροκρότησαν δυνατά.
translations.id: Setelah pidato, semua orang bertepuk tangan dengan keras.
translations.ro: După discurs, toată lumea a aplaudat tare.
translations.ja: スピーチのあと、みんなが大きな拍手をした。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'after', governs dative; heads the prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Rede' in the PP.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'Nach'.
Finite main verb, simple past, 3rd person plural; predicate of the clause.
Indefinite quantifier pronoun functioning as the plural subject ('everyone/all people').
Manner adverb modifying 'klatschten'.

translations.en: I’m practicing my speech right now.
translations.es: Estoy practicando mi discurso ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Je suis en train de répéter mon discours.
translations.it: Sto provando il mio discorso proprio adesso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在正在练习我的演讲。
translations.yue: 我而家喺度練我嘅演講。
translations.he: אני מתרגל את הנאום שלי עכשיו.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tập bài phát biểu của mình ngay lúc này.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn toespraak nu aan het oefenen.
translations.hi: मैं अभी अपना भाषण अभ्यास कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Κάνω πρόβα την ομιλία μου τώρα.
translations.nb: Jeg øver på talen min akkurat nå.
translations.id: Saya sedang berlatih pidato saya sekarang.
translations.sv: Jag övar på mitt tal just nu.
translations.cs: Právě teď si nacvičuji svůj projev.
translations.da: Jeg øver min tale lige nu.
translations.ja: 今、スピーチの練習をしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present, 1st person singular; predicate.
Temporal/aspectual adverb indicating an action in progress.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Rede' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'übe'.

sentences.target: Die Rede war länger als geplant.

translations.de: Die Rede war länger als geplant.
translations.en: The speech was longer than planned.
translations.es: El discurso fue más largo de lo previsto.
translations.fr: Le discours a été plus long que prévu.
translations.it: Il discorso è stato più lungo del previsto.
translations.yue: 個演講比原先預計長咗。
translations.pt: O discurso foi mais longo do que o previsto.
translations.vi: Bài phát biểu dài hơn dự kiến.
translations.ar: كان الخطاب أطول مما كان مخططًا له.
translations.nl: De toespraak was langer dan gepland.
translations.uk: Промова була довшою, ніж було заплановано.
translations.hu: A beszéd hosszabb volt a tervezettnél.
translations.hi: भाषण उम्मीद से लंबा हो गया।
translations.el: Η ομιλία ήταν πιο μεγάλη απ’ ό,τι είχε προγραμματιστεί.
translations.id: Pidatonya lebih lama dari yang direncanakan.
translations.ro: Discursul a fost mai lung decât era planificat.
translations.cs: Projev byl delší, než se plánovalo.
translations.fi: Puhe oli pidempi kuin oli suunniteltu.
translations.ja: スピーチは予定より長くなりました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Rede'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), simple past, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Comparative adjective functioning as predicate complement in a comparison.
Subordinating conjunction used as a comparative marker introducing the comparison.
Past participle used adjectivally; forms a comparative benchmark ('than planned').

Die Rede war länger als geplant.

Nach der Rede klatschten alle laut.
Die Rede war länger als geplant.

After the speech, everyone clapped loudly.
I’m practicing my speech right now.
The speech was longer than planned.
